effects.name: Boost
effects.desc: Target crew gets +2 power for this operation

effects.name: Hook
effects.desc: Pushed attack: flip threshold reduced by potency

effects.name: Poison
effects.desc: Target enemy crew loses 1 power per turn for potency turns

effects.name: Shield
effects.desc: Crew ignores next potency attacks against it

effects.name: Speed
effects.desc: Crew can act immediately after being placed (skip setup turn)
